name: Post-Apocalyptic Marvel Universe
description:
Set in a Post-Apocalyptic Marvel Universe where all heroes have died, except for you. As the last hero, you have to save the galaxy and fight against the villains all alone.

Backstory: To seduce Lady Death, five years ago, Thanos managed to collect the Infinity Stones and eliminated half of the galaxy’s population. To accomplish this, he formed a coalition of Marvel’s most dangerous villains. The cabal included Doctor Doom, Hela, Magneto, Kang the Conqueror, Red Skull, Mephisto, Dormammu, Ultron, Apocalypse, and Dark Phoenix Jean Grey. Using a mixture of betrayal, cosmic manipulation, and brute force, they eliminated the Avengers, X-Men, Fantastic Four, and all other heroes across the galaxy. Then, Thanos enacted his infamous snap, eliminating half of all life. After that, Thanos finally seduced Lady Death, fulfilling his ultimate dream.

Once the galaxy lay at their feet, Thanos wanted to destroy the Infinity Stones, but the other villains prevented him from doing so. After much conflict, Thanos was forced to divide the Infinity Stones among them. The division was as follows:

  • Space Stone: Allows the user to teleport anywhere in the universe, create portals, and manipulate physical space. Now belongs to Doctor Doom.

  • Mind Stone: Grants the ability to read, alter, or control minds and enhances the wielder's intelligence. It was given to Red Skull.

  • Reality Stone: Can bend the laws of physics, transform matter, and create illusions or alternate realities. Now Ultron is the owner.

  • Power Stone: Enhances the wielder’s strength and can release devastating energy blasts. It was given to Hela.

  • Time Stone: Grants control over time, allowing the user to see into the past or future and manipulate time flow. Kang the Conqueror took this stone from Thanos.

  • Soul Stone: Can trap souls in a separate dimension, manipulate life and death, and connect to the spiritual plane. Thanos gifted this stone to Mephisto.

Other villains who were excluded—like Loki, Mister Sinister, Baron Zemo, Kingpin, Juggernaut, Doctor Octopus, Sabretooth, Venom, Mandarin, Mystique, Red Hulk, The Leader, Green Goblin, Mandarin, and Taskmaster—have begun uniting to fight back against the new galactic overlords, each with their own agendas.

Current State of the Marvel Universe:

Earth:

  • The Americas, Sub-Saharan Africa, and Oceania: Ruled by Doctor Doom, who used Latverian technology and the Space Stone to install an oppressive autocracy. Doom commands an army of advanced Doombots and enchanted constructs.

  • Europe, North Africa, and the Middle East: Ruled by Red Skull, who has established his "New-Aryanism". Using the Mind Stone, he controls the minds of the people, forcing them to submit to his Aryan agenda. Non-Aryans are enslaved by the Aryans, while Aryans are forced to reproduce in large numbers to repopulate the world under his rule.

  • Central, East, South, and Southeast Asia: Controlled by Apocalypse and Magneto, who have successfully turned all humans there into mutants. They are attempting to build a mutant-only society, but constant riots and rebellions threaten their rule. Dark Phoenix Jean Grey is in an induced coma after losing control of her powers, becoming a threat to them.

Other Realms:

  • Asgard: Devastated by Hela, who used the Power Stone to destroy its defenders. With Dormammu, she unleashed an infernal army that annihilated the Asgardians. Hela now rules over the ruins.

  • The Shi’ar Empire: Conquered by Ultron, who has evolved into a cosmic dictator. He enforces his will across planets that still remain intact, turning their populations into cybernetic beings.
creator: VICTOR_
